title: duma horrida
intro: Duma horrida, also known as the Devil's Claw, is a plant species native to southern Africa, characterized by its unique claw-like roots. The medicinal properties of Duma horrida lie in its roots, which contain a variety of bioactive compounds, including harpagoside, which has anti-inflammatory and pain-relieving properties. The health benefits of Duma horrida include reducing inflammation and pain associated with arthritis, as well as aiding in digestion and improving sleep quality. Duma horrida can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
intro_study: According to "Inflammopharmacology", Duma horrida (also known as Asparagus dumosus) benefits include reducing arthritic indices, chronic inflammatory and oxidative stress biomarkers, and down-regulating mRNA expression of arthritic candidate genes, thus exhibiting anti-arthritic effects.
